file_name: ADMA BioManufacturing, LLC -  Amendment #3 to Manufacturing Agreement .txt

perturbation.original_text: Such payments shall be made in accordance with Section 3.4 of the Agreement; provided, however, that the initial payment described in Section 5(a) above shall be due no later than December 31,2017.
perturbation.changed_text: Such payments shall be made in accordance with Section 3.4 of the Agreement; provided, however, that the initial payment described in Section 5(a) above shall be due no later than December 31, 2018.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces an in-text contradiction by modifying the due date for the initial payment. Originally, it was due no later than December 31, 2017. The modification changes this to December 31, 2018, which creates a conflict because the amendment is dated December 21, 2017. This is contraditory, since it dictates, that a payment due December 31, 2018, should have been paid before even the contract started.
perturbation.contradicted_text: In consideration for certain quantities of Product that ADMA would have been contractually obligated to supply, and that Sanofi Pasteur would have been contractually obligated to purchase, under the Agreement, but that will now not be supplied and purchased as a result of the Parties' agreement in Section 2 above, Sanofi Pasteur agrees to pay ADMA an amount of seven million (7,000,000 USD) (the "Compensation Fee") in five installments and will be invoiced as follows: (a) [***] USD upon execution of this Amendment #3 (b) [***] USD on March 1, 2018 (c) [***] USD on June 1, 2018 (d) [***] USD on September 1, 2018 (e) [***] USD on December 1, 2018 Such payments shall be made in accordance with Section 3.4 of the Agreement; provided, however, that the initial payment described in Section 5(a) above shall be due no later than December 31, 2018. Each invoice shall reference this Amendment 3 and shall be sent at the following address: Sanofi Pasteur SA DSFF Pole de Lyon - Carteret Tri C5-2-01 14 Espace Henry Vallee CS 90119 69361 LYON CEDEX 07 - FRANCE Upon payment of the Compensation Fee, ADMA shall be fully compensated for any kind of prejudice or damages ADMA may suffer arising from or related to the decrease in the quantities of Product Sanofi Pasteur committed to purchase initially from ADMA as per the Prior Supply Terms. ADMA declares that the Compensation Fee is fair and equitable.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies the due date of the initial payment to December 31, 2018. The amendment itself is dated December 21, 2017. This creates a direct contradiction because the contract now implies a payment is due after the contract was signed, according to Section 5(a) described in the contradicted text. The Contradicted text states: "Such payments shall be made in accordance with Section 3.4 of the Agreement; provided, however, that the initial payment described in Section 5(a) above shall be due no later than December 31, 2018."

perturbation.original_text: The Parties shall use best efforts to complete such amendment to the Quality Agreement within 60 days after the Amendment Effective Date.
perturbation.changed_text: The Parties shall complete such amendment to the Quality Agreement no later than 30 days prior to the Amendment Effective Date.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces an in-text contradiction. The original text states that the amendment to the Quality Agreement should be completed within 60 days *after* the Amendment Effective Date. The modified text changes this to be completed no later than 30 days *prior* to the Amendment Effective Date. Since the amendment effective date is December 21, 2017, this perturbation implies the QA should have been done prior to the contract's inception.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The Parties further agree to amend that certain Quality and Technical Agreement between Sanofi Pasteur and ADMA (as successor to BPC) effective as of September 15, 2015 (the "Quality Agreement") to modify the address where the Source Plasma shall be stocked and the conditions associated therewith, as well as to ensure consistency with the other terms of this Amendment. The Parties shall complete such amendment to the Quality Agreement no later than 30 days prior to the Amendment Effective Date.
perturbation.justification: The changed text states that the Quality Agreement amendment must be completed no later than 30 days prior to the Amendment Effective Date. The contradicted text includes this same clause. The original text stated it should be completed within 60 days after the Amendment Effective Date. The change introduces a contradiction because it requires the QA to be completed *before* the effective date, contradicting the original intention for it to be completed *after* that date. This is an Inconsistency that creates an in-text contradiction because the modified text conflicts with the implied timeframe established by the original text.

perturbation.original_text: Prices for such [***] Batches of Product shall be in accordance with Section 3.2 of the Agreement (as amended in Amendment #2).
perturbation.changed_text: Prices for such [***] Batches of Product shall be determined at Sanofi Pasteur's sole discretion, regardless of Section 3.2 of the Agreement (as amended in Amendment #2).
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces an in-text contradiction concerning the pricing of product batches. The original text specifies that prices should be determined according to Section 3.2 of the main Agreement (as amended). The modification grants Sanofi Pasteur sole discretion in setting prices, explicitly overriding Section 3.2. This creates uncertainty about how prices will be determined, directly contradicting the established pricing mechanism.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The supply terms set forth in Section 1 of Amendment #2 (the "Prior Supply Terms") are hereby deleted in their entirety. In their place, the Parties agree to the following (and Section 2.1 of the Agreement is hereby amended as needed to implement the following): Sanofi Pasteur agrees to purchase and ADMA to manufacture [***] Batches of Product, which Batches will be produced over a period from Q3 2018 to Q3 2019. Attached hereto as Exhibit A is a detailed supply plan provided to ADMA by Sanofi Pasteur (the "Updated Supply Plan") that describes the agreed-upon timing for production of such Batches of Product, which supply plan is made an integral part hereof and shall be binding on the Parties. Prices for such [***] Batches of Product shall be determined at Sanofi Pasteur's sole discretion, regardless of Section 3.2 of the Agreement (as amended in Amendment #2).
perturbation.justification: The changed text states that prices for product batches shall be determined at Sanofi Pasteur's sole discretion, regardless of Section 3.2 of the Agreement. The contradicted text includes the identical clause: "Prices for such [***] Batches of Product shall be determined at Sanofi Pasteur's sole discretion, regardless of Section 3.2 of the Agreement (as amended in Amendment #2)." While the clauses are identical in the changed text and contradicted text, the change from the original text introduced this clause which now overrides the pricing mechanism previously established in Section 3.2, creating a direct contradiction. This introduces a strong contradiction regarding how pricing is determined, making it uncertain and unenforceable.
